title: Jammu、Jammu and Kashmir — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Jammu、Jammu and Kashmir的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Jammu是Jammu and Kashmir的一个城市，人口约700,000。The winter capital of Jammu and Kashmir, known for its ancient temples, Vaishno Devi shrine, and as a gateway to the Kashmir Valley.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
